listing.long_description:
# All Mobs Hate The SUN

## Features

**Universal Daylight Combustion**
Every hostile mob instantly burns when exposed to sunlight, including during partial shade and light rain. No more creepers lurking under trees or zombies surviving cloudy days.

**Intensified Solar Damage**
Mobs take 6 damage every second while burning - twice as fast as normal sunlight damage. This ensures even hardier creatures like witches and spider jockeys get eliminated quickly.

**Works Out-of-the-Box**
No commands or configuration needed. Simply install and watch the daylight purge begin. Compatible with any 1.12.2 Forge modpack that doesn't modify core mob sunlight mechanics.
listing.name: All Mobs Hate The SUN
listing.short_description: Tired of hostile mobs surviving in sunlight? Now all hostile creatures burn under the sun, day or night.

metadata.description: All hostile mobs burn during the day. Sun burns harder.
metadata.name: All Most Hate The SUN
